{{CargoRelic
|name=The Gold Reaper's Cup
|class_id=20981
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=A gleaming trophy with five stars, each representing a crushing victory where she left opponents in tears. Its weight whispers: "You shall not pass... to the next round."
|fame=27
|art=14
|fth=19
|civ=12
|tech=18
|ss1=Snail RUSH +10<br>Per 10 Snail Arena matches, Snail ATK +6<br>Snail Arena matches fought: 100/100
|ss2=Snail RUSH +20<br>Per 10 Snail Arena matches, Snail ATK +9<br>Snail Arena matches fought: 100/100
|ss3=Snail RUSH +30<br>Per 10 Snail Arena matches, Snail ATK +12<br>Snail Arena matches fought: 100/100
|ss4=Snail RUSH +30<br>Per 10 Snail Arena matches, Snail ATK +12<br>Snail Arena matches fought: 100/100
|ss7=Snail RUSH +30<br>Per 10 Snail Arena matches, Snail ATK +12<br>Snail Arena matches fought: 100/100<br> (Awakened)
}}
